Product overview

A complete learning ecosystem for modern primary schools.

From early phonics to confident spelling, EduSpell Pro AI combines engaging content, adaptive feedback, and rich reporting in one polished experience.

Adaptive practice

Children receive exercises tailored to their current level and confidence.

Teacher insights

Easy-to-read dashboards help staff plan interventions and celebrate growth.

Parent visibility

Families stay connected with weekly summaries and clear next-step guidance.

AI features

Designed to make learning feel personal and powerful.

Spelling support

Personalised spelling tasks with instant feedback and pronunciation guidance.

Vocabulary growth

Adaptive word selection keeps learning aligned with each child’s stage.

Confidence coaching

Gentle encouragement and visual progress stories help children stay motivated.

Teacher automation

Reduce admin time with smart summaries and intervention suggestions.

Interactive demo

Try a classroom-ready experience in minutes.

See how the platform supports phonics, spelling, pronunciation, and progress tracking through a live, guided walkthrough.
